commands.review_summary:
The PR updates MiniMax Token Plan parsing and web usage fetching to use remains data when parsed HTML lacks service lanes, accept alternate boost-field spelling, and cover the fallback/auth/cancellation cases with focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main only falls back to remains after HTML parse failure and decodes only the older boost-key spelling, while the PR adds the missing parseable-HTML fallback and alternate boost keys. I did not run a live MiniMax probe because AGENTS.md requires explicit permission for live provider/account validation.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the external real-behavior proof gate is still open and automation cannot provide the contributor's live MiniMax account evidence.
